headline: Coca-Cola FEMSA (KOF): A Long-Term Bet Facing Short-Term Trials
summary: Coca-Cola Femsa (NYSE:KOF) is one of the best long-term stocks to invest in according to Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Trust. headline: Rising Cost-of-Living Pressures? Why Retirees Should Buy This High-Yield Dividend Legend and Never Look Back
summary: Retirees watching grocery bills climb need income that grows faster than the receipt. Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) sells a recession-resistant product in nearly every country on earth, and its pricing power is doing exactly what income investors want it to do. With headline PCE at 3.77% and services inflation at 3.49%, the question I want to answer ... Rising Cost-of-Living Pressures? Why Retirees Should Buy This High-Yield Dividend Legend and Never Look Back

headline: Inherited Stock Resets Its Tax Bill to Zero and Here’s the IRS Rule That Does It
summary: If you’ve ever inherited a stock portfolio, a rental property, or even a single share of grandma’s old utility company, the IRS hands you a quiet gift most heirs never notice. It’s called the step-up in basis, and it can wipe out decades of capital gains tax in a single moment. The rule resets the ...
